TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Wu Tinghua == Harvard mitiliday o Taywan a tamdaw mi'iyak to tarokos no Congko. 2024/04/22 20:48 Ceyo-sepaw Zhu Lanhui/mikawitay mitilid (Patangsolay sinpon/kapolongan paratoh) itiniay i Amilika a tarokos no Congko ci Xie Feng i 'ayaw no pina romi'ad itira i daykako no Harvard a papelo, liyangan no tatoloay tamdaw, oya cecay a fafahiyan o nano Taywan Amilika a tamdaw mitiliday i daykako no Harvard ci Wu Tinghua, itiya pililid no tamdaw i micala' mi'iyak marketer "masamsamay to Taywan a Congko" saan, malosakasasowalen no 'alomanay. Oya mikidkiday mililid ci Wu Tinghuaan i o nano Congko a tamdaw, kasapinangan kora tamdaw o kakeridan no mitiliday no Congko i daykako no Harvard. I 4 folad 20 romi'ad, ci Xie Feng o tarokos no Congko mikihatiya to daykako no Harvard mikingkiway to Harvard Kennedy School midemakan a "Congko a lisaot" a papelo itiya, oya mitengilay 2 fafahiyan 1 fa'inayan talifahal sa a tomireng, macacayat to nitilidan "Mangahay Congko kahangangay tilid, laha' sa to ngangan ni Xie Feng, 'ang'ang sa pasowal kao Sicang , Singciang (Xinjiang) salongoc no tamdaw ato sakapakonira no Hongkong kasalekapot ko kasasowalen ari, sa pacekok sa ci Xie Feng itiya. Oya 3 tamdaw malilid to tayra i papotal, oya milafelay i Amilika miliyangay tamdaw ci Zhou Fengsuo sacisowal sa, oya tomirengay miliyang a 3 tamdaw i o nano "Mifelihay to kiwsangto kapolongay no mitiliday" ato "Pakoniraay no Sicang sakapot no mitiliday, o cecay a fafahiyan o nano Taywan Amilika a tamdaw mitiliday i daykako no Harvard ci Wu Tinghua. Toya pililidan pasadak ci Wu Tinghuaan itiya micala' maketer: "Kamo ko micefisay to sapakoniraaw no Hongkong, mipelengay to nikapolongan nangra, anini sa mipakamay haca kamo to kitakit niyam o Taywan! Mangahay Congko! Mapatayay finawlan!" Saan. Ikor no nian mayakyak to itini i calay ci Wu Tinghua ato rama miliyangay a fafahiyan mitiliday (nai Sicang ) malilid pasadak tala papotal a nisyasingan a filomo, ci Wu Tinghua pasimisyasingay a pasowal, "Nicokaran no mitiliday i daykako niyam pasadak kami i honi, anini o torokos no Congko ci Xie Feng misalata'ang i laloma' papelo to mangahay, o papasowalen ita o Harvard tamdaw cnga, caay ko papaliyasen ita to sapisintingaw ningra." Maketon ko pipapeloan ni Xie Feng a saying to naikoran malokasasowalen no 'alomanay i calay, oya itiraay i miliyangay a 'alomanay a mitiliday tamdaw to piliyang malaha to ngaayay sanay. Roma sato, ira ko pakahapinangay toya mikidkiday pasadak ci Wu Tinghuaan a fa'inayan tamdaw. Anini mihecaan o tayniay i Taywan a misolapay to pisingkiw to congtong a masowalay tamdaw mirakarakay i Amilika ca "Kongce Sen " itira i X cadada a micokar, oya mikidkiday mililid to miliyangay to tarokos no Congko to fafahiyan no Taywan a tamdaw o mitiliday i Harvard a kakeridan no mitiliday no Congko ci Zou Hongji, pasadak haca to nano demakan ni Zou Hongji. Marketer milokes ci Kongce Sen : "O nia tamdaw o kasasowalan i Beijing, mitilid to kasakitakit a sici kicay a todongan, sacisowal sa mala no hekalan a finawlan, palowaday to ponka a kacacofeliw. Oya sapisamawmaw a somowal to kimad no Congko, mala mipaloay no Congko kiwsanto a tamdaw. O komaenay to kakaenen to sapakaen to wao no misatekeday mikowan a malahad mato'as, oya caayay pi'ilos a tamdaw o citanengay tamdaw ahan." Saan. Ala keteketer to ko i alayay tamdaw, "O mitiliday aca kina tamdaw i, caay ko imeng no pitilidan, o maan ko todong a pakamay?", "Hatira to ko kaolah to Cong kiwsanto, kalamkamen patiko tayra i kiwsanto a kitakit a!", "Panokayen!", "Pakonira han no daykako no Harvard ko matiniay a demak?", "Awaay ko todong ningra midemak to miliyangay a fafahiyan no Taywan, o mikari'angay to tatirengan no tamdaw ko matiniay", "Awaay ko todong ningra sapidemak, o maan ko todong milaplap to tamdaw?" "Manengneng ko nia pakayayo samatira sa ko piri'ang to miliyangay to mitiliday, o Amlka tn caay haw? o sasamaanen no Harvard ko nianan?". Mifalicay to tilid, ci Masao Nikar
S.PHON: == wo~u~u tiŋħo~u~ua == ħarb~varɬ~ɮ mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj o~u tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw miʡijak to~u taro~uko~us no~u ʦo~uŋko~u. ****/**/** **:** ʦəjo~u-səpaw *ħo~u~u ɾanħo~u~ui/mikawitaj mitiɾiɬ~ɮ (pataŋso~uɾaj sinpo~un/kapo~uɾo~uŋan parato~uħ) itiniaj i amiɾika a taro~uko~us no~u ʦo~uŋko~u ʦi xiə fəŋ i ʡajaw no~u pina ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ itira i ɬ~ɮajkako~u no~u ħarb~varɬ~ɮ a papəɾo~u, ɾijaŋan no~u tato~uɾo~uaj tamɬ~ɮaw, o~uja ʦəʦaj a fafaħijan o~u nano~u tajwan amiɾika a tamɬ~ɮaw mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj i ɬ~ɮajkako~u no~u ħarb~varɬ~ɮ ʦi wo~u~u tiŋħo~u~ua, itija piɾiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw i miʦaɾaʡ miʡijak markətər "masamsamaj to~u tajwan a ʦo~uŋko~u" saan, maɾo~usakasaso~uwaɾən no~u ʡaɾo~umanaj. o~uja mikiɬ~ɮkiɬ~ɮaj miɾiɾiɬ~ɮ ʦi wo~u~u tiŋħo~u~uaan i o~u nano~u ʦo~uŋko~u a tamɬ~ɮaw, kasapinaŋan ko~ura tamɬ~ɮaw o~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj no~u ʦo~uŋko~u i ɬ~ɮajkako~u no~u ħarb~varɬ~ɮ. i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ʦi xiə fəŋ o~u taro~uko~us no~u ʦo~uŋko~u mikiħatija to~u ɬ~ɮajkako~u no~u ħarb~varɬ~ɮ mikiŋkiwaj to~u ħarb~varɬ~ɮ kənnəɬ~ɮj sʦħo~uo~uɾ miɬ~ɮəmakan a "ʦo~uŋko~u a ɾisao~ut" a papəɾo~u itija, o~uja mitəŋiɾaj * fafaħijan * faʡinajan taɾifaħaɾ sa a to~umirəŋ, maʦaʦajat to~u nitiɾiɬ~ɮan "maŋaħaj ʦo~uŋko~u kaħaŋaŋaj tiɾiɬ~ɮ, ɾaħaʡ sa to~u ŋaŋan ni xiə fəŋ, ʡaŋʡaŋ sa paso~uwaɾ kao~u siʦaŋ , siŋʦiaŋ (xinjiaŋ) saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u sakapako~unira no~u ħo~uŋko~uŋ kasaɾəkapo~ut ko~u kasaso~uwaɾən ari, sa paʦəko~uk sa ʦi xiə fəŋ itija. o~uja * tamɬ~ɮaw maɾiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u tajra i papo~utaɾ, o~uja miɾafəɾaj i amiɾika miɾijaŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi *ħo~uo~u~u fəŋso~u~uo~u saʦiso~uwaɾ sa, o~uja to~umirəŋaj miɾijaŋ a * tamɬ~ɮaw i o~u nano~u "mifəɾiħaj to~u kiwsaŋto~u kapo~uɾo~uŋaj no~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj" ato~u "pako~uniraaj no~u siʦaŋ sakapo~ut no~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj, o~u ʦəʦaj a fafaħijan o~u nano~u tajwan amiɾika a tamɬ~ɮaw mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj i ɬ~ɮajkako~u no~u ħarb~varɬ~ɮ ʦi wo~u~u tiŋħo~u~ua. to~uja piɾiɾiɬ~ɮan pasaɬ~ɮak ʦi wo~u~u tiŋħo~u~uaan itija miʦaɾaʡ makətər: "kamo~u ko~u miʦəfisaj to~u sapako~uniraaw no~u ħo~uŋko~uŋ, mipəɾəŋaj to~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan naŋra, anini sa mipakamaj ħaʦa kamo~u to~u kitakit nijam o~u tajwan! maŋaħaj ʦo~uŋko~u! mapatajaj finawɾan!" saan. iko~ur no~u nian majakjak to~u itini i ʦaɾaj ʦi wo~u~u tiŋħo~u~ua ato~u rama miɾijaŋaj a fafaħijan mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj (nai siʦaŋ ) maɾiɾiɬ~ɮ pasaɬ~ɮak taɾa papo~utaɾ a nisjasiŋan a fiɾo~umo~u, ʦi wo~u~u tiŋħo~u~ua pasimisjasiŋaj a paso~uwaɾ, "niʦo~ukaran no~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj i ɬ~ɮajkako~u nijam pasaɬ~ɮak kami i ħo~uni, anini o~u to~uro~uko~us no~u ʦo~uŋko~u ʦi xiə fəŋ misaɾataʡaŋ i ɾaɾo~umaʡ papəɾo~u to~u maŋaħaj, o~u papaso~uwaɾən ita o~u ħarb~varɬ~ɮ tamɬ~ɮaw ʦŋa, ʦaaj ko~u papaɾijasən ita to~u sapisintiŋaw niŋra." makəto~un ko~u pipapəɾo~uan ni xiə fəŋ a sajiŋ to~u naiko~uran maɾo~ukasaso~uwaɾən no~u ʡaɾo~umanaj i ʦaɾaj, o~uja itiraaj i miɾijaŋaj a ʡaɾo~umanaj a mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj tamɬ~ɮaw to~u piɾijaŋ maɾaħa to~u ŋaajaj sanaj. ro~uma sato~u, ira ko~u pakaħapinaŋaj to~uja mikiɬ~ɮkiɬ~ɮaj pasaɬ~ɮak ʦi wo~u~u tiŋħo~u~uaan a faʡinajan tamɬ~ɮaw. anini miħəʦaan o~u tajniaj i tajwan a miso~uɾapaj to~u pisiŋkiw to~u ʦo~uŋto~uŋ a maso~uwaɾaj tamɬ~ɮaw mirakarakaj i amiɾika ʦa "ko~uŋʦə sən " itira i x ʦaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa a miʦo~ukar, o~uja mikiɬ~ɮkiɬ~ɮaj miɾiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u miɾijaŋaj to~u taro~uko~us no~u ʦo~uŋko~u to~u fafaħijan no~u tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw o~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj i ħarb~varɬ~ɮ a kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj no~u ʦo~uŋko~u ʦi *o~uo~u~u ħo~uŋji, pasaɬ~ɮak ħaʦa to~u nano~u ɬ~ɮəmakan ni *o~uo~u~u ħo~uŋji. markətər miɾo~ukəs ʦi ko~uŋʦə sən : "o~u nia tamɬ~ɮaw o~u kasaso~uwaɾan i b~b~vəijiŋ, mitiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u kasakitakit a siʦi kiʦaj a to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan, saʦiso~uwaɾ sa maɾa no~u ħəkaɾan a finawɾan, paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮaj to~u po~unka a kaʦaʦo~ufəɾiw. o~uja sapisamawmaw a so~umo~uwaɾ to~u kimaɬ~ɮ no~u ʦo~uŋko~u, maɾa mipaɾo~uaj no~u ʦo~uŋko~u kiwsanto~u a tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u ko~umaənaj to~u kakaənən to~u sapakaən to~u wao~u no~u misatəkəɬ~ɮaj miko~uwan a maɾaħaɬ~ɮ mato~uʡas, o~uja ʦaajaj piʡiɾo~us a tamɬ~ɮaw o~u ʦitanəŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw aħan." saan. aɾa kətəkətər to~u ko~u i aɾajaj tamɬ~ɮaw, "o~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj aʦa kina tamɬ~ɮaw i, ʦaaj ko~u iməŋ no~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan, o~u maan ko~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ a pakamaj?", "ħatira to~u ko~u kao~uɾaħ to~u ʦo~uŋ kiwsanto~u, kaɾamkamən patiko~u tajra i kiwsanto~u a kitakit a!", "pano~ukajən!", "pako~unira ħan no~u ɬ~ɮajkako~u no~u ħarb~varɬ~ɮ ko~u matiniaj a ɬ~ɮəmak?", "awaaj ko~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ niŋra miɬ~ɮəmak to~u miɾijaŋaj a fafaħijan no~u tajwan, o~u mikariʡaŋaj to~u tatirəŋan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u matiniaj", "awaaj ko~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ niŋra sapiɬ~ɮəmak, o~u maan ko~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ miɾapɾap to~u tamɬ~ɮaw?" "manəŋnəŋ ko~u nia pakajajo~u samatira sa ko~u piriʡaŋ to~u miɾijaŋaj to~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj, o~u amɾka tn ʦaaj ħaw? o~u sasamaanən no~u ħarb~varɬ~ɮ ko~u nianan?". mifaɾiʦaj to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ, ʦi masao~u nikar
S.FORM: == Wu Tinghua == Harvard mitiliday o Taywan a tamdaw mi'iyak to tarokos no Congko. 2024/04/22 20:48 Ceyo-sepaw Zhu Lanhui/mikawitay mitilid (Patangsolay sinpon/kapolongan paratoh) itiniay i Amilika a tarokos no Congko ci Xie Feng i 'ayaw no pina romi'ad itira i daykako no Harvard a papelo, liyangan no tatoloay tamdaw, oya cecay a fafahiyan o nano Taywan Amilika a tamdaw mitiliday i daykako no Harvard ci Wu Tinghua, itiya pililid no tamdaw i micala' mi'iyak marketer "masamsamay to Taywan a Congko" saan, malosakasasowalen no 'alomanay. Oya mikidkiday mililid ci Wu Tinghuaan i o nano Congko a tamdaw, kasapinangan kora tamdaw o kakeridan no mitiliday no Congko i daykako no Harvard. I 4 folad 20 romi'ad, ci Xie Feng o tarokos no Congko mikihatiya to daykako no Harvard mikingkiway to Harvard Kennedy School midemakan a "Congko a lisaot" a papelo itiya, oya mitengilay 2 fafahiyan 1 fa'inayan talifahal sa a tomireng, macacayat to nitilidan "Mangahay Congko kahangangay tilid, laha' sa to ngangan ni Xie Feng, 'ang'ang sa pasowal kao Sicang , Singciang (Xinjiang) salongoc no tamdaw ato sakapakonira no Hongkong kasalekapot ko kasasowalen ari, sa pacekok sa ci Xie Feng itiya. Oya 3 tamdaw malilid to tayra i papotal, oya milafelay i Amilika miliyangay tamdaw ci Zhou Fengsuo sacisowal sa, oya tomirengay miliyang a 3 tamdaw i o nano "Mifelihay to kiwsangto kapolongay no mitiliday" ato "Pakoniraay no Sicang sakapot no mitiliday, o cecay a fafahiyan o nano Taywan Amilika a tamdaw mitiliday i daykako no Harvard ci Wu Tinghua. Toya pililidan pasadak ci Wu Tinghuaan itiya micala' maketer: "Kamo ko micefisay to sapakoniraaw no Hongkong, mipelengay to nikapolongan nangra, anini sa mipakamay haca kamo to kitakit niyam o Taywan! Mangahay Congko! Mapatayay finawlan!" Saan. Ikor no nian mayakyak to itini i calay ci Wu Tinghua ato rama miliyangay a fafahiyan mitiliday (nai Sicang ) malilid pasadak tala papotal a nisyasingan a filomo, ci Wu Tinghua pasimisyasingay a pasowal, "Nicokaran no mitiliday i daykako niyam pasadak kami i honi, anini o torokos no Congko ci Xie Feng misalata'ang i laloma' papelo to mangahay, o papasowalen ita o Harvard tamdaw cnga, caay ko papaliyasen ita to sapisintingaw ningra." Maketon ko pipapeloan ni Xie Feng a saying to naikoran malokasasowalen no 'alomanay i calay, oya itiraay i miliyangay a 'alomanay a mitiliday tamdaw to piliyang malaha to ngaayay sanay. Roma sato, ira ko pakahapinangay toya mikidkiday pasadak ci Wu Tinghuaan a fa'inayan tamdaw. Anini mihecaan o tayniay i Taywan a misolapay to pisingkiw to congtong a masowalay tamdaw mirakarakay i Amilika ca "Kongce Sen " itira i X cadada a micokar, oya mikidkiday mililid to miliyangay to tarokos no Congko to fafahiyan no Taywan a tamdaw o mitiliday i Harvard a kakeridan no mitiliday no Congko ci Zou Hongji, pasadak haca to nano demakan ni Zou Hongji. Marketer milokes ci Kongce Sen : "O nia tamdaw o kasasowalan i Beijing, mitilid to kasakitakit a sici kicay a todongan, sacisowal sa mala no hekalan a finawlan, palowaday to ponka a kacacofeliw. Oya sapisamawmaw a somowal to kimad no Congko, mala mipaloay no Congko kiwsanto a tamdaw. O komaenay to kakaenen to sapakaen to wao no misatekeday mikowan a malahad mato'as, oya caayay pi'ilos a tamdaw o citanengay tamdaw ahan." Saan. Ala keteketer to ko i alayay tamdaw, "O mitiliday aca kina tamdaw i, caay ko imeng no pitilidan, o maan ko todong a pakamay?", "Hatira to ko kaolah to Cong kiwsanto, kalamkamen patiko tayra i kiwsanto a kitakit a!", "Panokayen!", "Pakonira han no daykako no Harvard ko matiniay a demak?", "Awaay ko todong ningra midemak to miliyangay a fafahiyan no Taywan, o mikari'angay to tatirengan no tamdaw ko matiniay", "Awaay ko todong ningra sapidemak, o maan ko todong milaplap to tamdaw?" "Manengneng ko nia pakayayo samatira sa ko piri'ang to miliyangay to mitiliday, o Amlka tn caay haw? o sasamaanen no Harvard ko nianan?". Mifalicay to tilid, ci Masao Nikar
S.PHON: == wo~u~u tiŋħo~u~ua == ħarb~varɬ~ɮ mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj o~u tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw miʡijak to~u taro~uko~us no~u ʦo~uŋko~u. ****/**/** **:** ʦəjo~u-səpaw *ħo~u~u ɾanħo~u~ui/mikawitaj mitiɾiɬ~ɮ (pataŋso~uɾaj sinpo~un/kapo~uɾo~uŋan parato~uħ) itiniaj i amiɾika a taro~uko~us no~u ʦo~uŋko~u ʦi xiə fəŋ i ʡajaw no~u pina ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ itira i ɬ~ɮajkako~u no~u ħarb~varɬ~ɮ a papəɾo~u, ɾijaŋan no~u tato~uɾo~uaj tamɬ~ɮaw, o~uja ʦəʦaj a fafaħijan o~u nano~u tajwan amiɾika a tamɬ~ɮaw mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj i ɬ~ɮajkako~u no~u ħarb~varɬ~ɮ ʦi wo~u~u tiŋħo~u~ua, itija piɾiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw i miʦaɾaʡ miʡijak markətər "masamsamaj to~u tajwan a ʦo~uŋko~u" saan, maɾo~usakasaso~uwaɾən no~u ʡaɾo~umanaj. o~uja mikiɬ~ɮkiɬ~ɮaj miɾiɾiɬ~ɮ ʦi wo~u~u tiŋħo~u~uaan i o~u nano~u ʦo~uŋko~u a tamɬ~ɮaw, kasapinaŋan ko~ura tamɬ~ɮaw o~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj no~u ʦo~uŋko~u i ɬ~ɮajkako~u no~u ħarb~varɬ~ɮ. i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ʦi xiə fəŋ o~u taro~uko~us no~u ʦo~uŋko~u mikiħatija to~u ɬ~ɮajkako~u no~u ħarb~varɬ~ɮ mikiŋkiwaj to~u ħarb~varɬ~ɮ kənnəɬ~ɮj sʦħo~uo~uɾ miɬ~ɮəmakan a "ʦo~uŋko~u a ɾisao~ut" a papəɾo~u itija, o~uja mitəŋiɾaj * fafaħijan * faʡinajan taɾifaħaɾ sa a to~umirəŋ, maʦaʦajat to~u nitiɾiɬ~ɮan "maŋaħaj ʦo~uŋko~u kaħaŋaŋaj tiɾiɬ~ɮ, ɾaħaʡ sa to~u ŋaŋan ni xiə fəŋ, ʡaŋʡaŋ sa paso~uwaɾ kao~u siʦaŋ , siŋʦiaŋ (xinjiaŋ) saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u sakapako~unira no~u ħo~uŋko~uŋ kasaɾəkapo~ut ko~u kasaso~uwaɾən ari, sa paʦəko~uk sa ʦi xiə fəŋ itija. o~uja * tamɬ~ɮaw maɾiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u tajra i papo~utaɾ, o~uja miɾafəɾaj i amiɾika miɾijaŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi *ħo~uo~u~u fəŋso~u~uo~u saʦiso~uwaɾ sa, o~uja to~umirəŋaj miɾijaŋ a * tamɬ~ɮaw i o~u nano~u "mifəɾiħaj to~u kiwsaŋto~u kapo~uɾo~uŋaj no~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj" ato~u "pako~uniraaj no~u siʦaŋ sakapo~ut no~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj, o~u ʦəʦaj a fafaħijan o~u nano~u tajwan amiɾika a tamɬ~ɮaw mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj i ɬ~ɮajkako~u no~u ħarb~varɬ~ɮ ʦi wo~u~u tiŋħo~u~ua. to~uja piɾiɾiɬ~ɮan pasaɬ~ɮak ʦi wo~u~u tiŋħo~u~uaan itija miʦaɾaʡ makətər: "kamo~u ko~u miʦəfisaj to~u sapako~uniraaw no~u ħo~uŋko~uŋ, mipəɾəŋaj to~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan naŋra, anini sa mipakamaj ħaʦa kamo~u to~u kitakit nijam o~u tajwan! maŋaħaj ʦo~uŋko~u! mapatajaj finawɾan!" saan. iko~ur no~u nian majakjak to~u itini i ʦaɾaj ʦi wo~u~u tiŋħo~u~ua ato~u rama miɾijaŋaj a fafaħijan mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj (nai siʦaŋ ) maɾiɾiɬ~ɮ pasaɬ~ɮak taɾa papo~utaɾ a nisjasiŋan a fiɾo~umo~u, ʦi wo~u~u tiŋħo~u~ua pasimisjasiŋaj a paso~uwaɾ, "niʦo~ukaran no~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj i ɬ~ɮajkako~u nijam pasaɬ~ɮak kami i ħo~uni, anini o~u to~uro~uko~us no~u ʦo~uŋko~u ʦi xiə fəŋ misaɾataʡaŋ i ɾaɾo~umaʡ papəɾo~u to~u maŋaħaj, o~u papaso~uwaɾən ita o~u ħarb~varɬ~ɮ tamɬ~ɮaw ʦŋa, ʦaaj ko~u papaɾijasən ita to~u sapisintiŋaw niŋra." makəto~un ko~u pipapəɾo~uan ni xiə fəŋ a sajiŋ to~u naiko~uran maɾo~ukasaso~uwaɾən no~u ʡaɾo~umanaj i ʦaɾaj, o~uja itiraaj i miɾijaŋaj a ʡaɾo~umanaj a mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj tamɬ~ɮaw to~u piɾijaŋ maɾaħa to~u ŋaajaj sanaj. ro~uma sato~u, ira ko~u pakaħapinaŋaj to~uja mikiɬ~ɮkiɬ~ɮaj pasaɬ~ɮak ʦi wo~u~u tiŋħo~u~uaan a faʡinajan tamɬ~ɮaw. anini miħəʦaan o~u tajniaj i tajwan a miso~uɾapaj to~u pisiŋkiw to~u ʦo~uŋto~uŋ a maso~uwaɾaj tamɬ~ɮaw mirakarakaj i amiɾika ʦa "ko~uŋʦə sən " itira i x ʦaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa a miʦo~ukar, o~uja mikiɬ~ɮkiɬ~ɮaj miɾiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u miɾijaŋaj to~u taro~uko~us no~u ʦo~uŋko~u to~u fafaħijan no~u tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw o~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj i ħarb~varɬ~ɮ a kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj no~u ʦo~uŋko~u ʦi *o~uo~u~u ħo~uŋji, pasaɬ~ɮak ħaʦa to~u nano~u ɬ~ɮəmakan ni *o~uo~u~u ħo~uŋji. markətər miɾo~ukəs ʦi ko~uŋʦə sən : "o~u nia tamɬ~ɮaw o~u kasaso~uwaɾan i b~b~vəijiŋ, mitiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u kasakitakit a siʦi kiʦaj a to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan, saʦiso~uwaɾ sa maɾa no~u ħəkaɾan a finawɾan, paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮaj to~u po~unka a kaʦaʦo~ufəɾiw. o~uja sapisamawmaw a so~umo~uwaɾ to~u kimaɬ~ɮ no~u ʦo~uŋko~u, maɾa mipaɾo~uaj no~u ʦo~uŋko~u kiwsanto~u a tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u ko~umaənaj to~u kakaənən to~u sapakaən to~u wao~u no~u misatəkəɬ~ɮaj miko~uwan a maɾaħaɬ~ɮ mato~uʡas, o~uja ʦaajaj piʡiɾo~us a tamɬ~ɮaw o~u ʦitanəŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw aħan." saan. aɾa kətəkətər to~u ko~u i aɾajaj tamɬ~ɮaw, "o~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj aʦa kina tamɬ~ɮaw i, ʦaaj ko~u iməŋ no~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan, o~u maan ko~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ a pakamaj?", "ħatira to~u ko~u kao~uɾaħ to~u ʦo~uŋ kiwsanto~u, kaɾamkamən patiko~u tajra i kiwsanto~u a kitakit a!", "pano~ukajən!", "pako~unira ħan no~u ɬ~ɮajkako~u no~u ħarb~varɬ~ɮ ko~u matiniaj a ɬ~ɮəmak?", "awaaj ko~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ niŋra miɬ~ɮəmak to~u miɾijaŋaj a fafaħijan no~u tajwan, o~u mikariʡaŋaj to~u tatirəŋan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u matiniaj", "awaaj ko~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ niŋra sapiɬ~ɮəmak, o~u maan ko~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ miɾapɾap to~u tamɬ~ɮaw?" "manəŋnəŋ ko~u nia pakajajo~u samatira sa ko~u piriʡaŋ to~u miɾijaŋaj to~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj, o~u amɾka tn ʦaaj ħaw? o~u sasamaanən no~u ħarb~varɬ~ɮ ko~u nianan?". mifaɾiʦaj to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ, ʦi masao~u nikar
